# Data Model: mos_target_mangadrpall_parquet


MOS Target Table: mangadrpall


## Contents
- [Basic Information](#basic-information)
- [Changelog](#changelog)
- [Example DATAFRAME List](#example-dataframe-list)
- [Notes](#notes)
- [Regrets](#regrets)
---

## Basic Information
Final summary file of the MaNGA Data Reduction Pipeline (DRP).

### Naming Convention
$MOS_TARGET/[V_TARG]/[FTYPE]/mos_mangadrpall.[FTYPE] with FTYPE='parquet' and V_TARG='2.0.0' for DR20.

### Releases
DR20

### Enviroments
MOS_TARGET

### Approximate Size
4 MB

### File Type
PARQUET

### Generated by Product
sdss5db targeting database.

### Is a VAC
False

### Data Level
2.3.3

### DATAFRAME List for release DR20
- Primary data frame.

---

## Changelog
Describes changes to the datamodel product and/or file structure from one release to another

---
## Example DATAFRAME List

### Columns


#### plate

- Column Name: plate
- Description: Plate ID
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int32


#### ifudsgn

- Column Name: ifudsgn
- Description: IFU design id (e.g. 12701)
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: String


#### plateifu

- Column Name: plateifu
- Description: Plate+ifudesign name for this object (e.g. 7443-12701)
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: String


#### mangaid

- Column Name: mangaid
- Description: MaNGA ID for this object (e.g. 1-114145)
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: String


#### versdrp2

- Column Name: versdrp2
- Description: Version of DRP used for 2d reductions
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: String


#### versdrp3

- Column Name: versdrp3
- Description: Version of DRP used for 3d reductions
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: String


#### verscore

- Column Name: verscore
- Description: Version of mangacore used for reductions
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: String


#### versutil

- Column Name: versutil
- Description: Version of idlutils used for reductions
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: String


#### versprim

- Column Name: versprim
- Description: Version of mangapreim used for reductions
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: String


#### platetyp

- Column Name: platetyp
- Description: Plate type (e.g. MANGA, APOGEE-2&amp;MANGA)
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: String


#### srvymode

- Column Name: srvymode
- Description: Survey mode (e.g. MANGA dither, MANGA stare, APOGEE lead)
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: String


#### objra

- Column Name: objra
- Description: Right ascension of the science object in J2000
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float64


#### objdec

- Column Name: objdec
- Description: Declination of the science object in J2000
- Unit: degrees
- Data Type: Float64


#### ifuglon

- Column Name: ifuglon
- Description: Galactic longitude corresponding to IFURA/DEC
- Unit: degrees
- Data Type: Float64


#### ifuglat

- Column Name: ifuglat
- Description: Galactic latitude corresponding to IFURA/DEC
- Unit: degrees
- Data Type: Float64


#### ifura

- Column Name: ifura
- Description: Right ascension of this IFU in J2000
- Unit: degrees
- Data Type: Float64


#### ifudec

- Column Name: ifudec
- Description: Declination of this IFU in J2000
- Unit: degrees
- Data Type: Float64


#### ebvgal

- Column Name: ebvgal
- Description: E(B-V) value from SDSS dust routine for this IFUGLON, IFUGLAT
- Unit: degrees
- Data Type: Float32


#### nexp

- Column Name: nexp
- Description: Number of science exposures combined
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int32


#### exptime

- Column Name: exptime
- Description: Total exposure time
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### drp3qual

- Column Name: drp3qual
- Description: Quality bitmask
- Unit: seconds
- Data Type: Int32


#### bluesn2

- Column Name: bluesn2
- Description: Total blue SN2 across all nexp exposures
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### redsn2

- Column Name: redsn2
- Description: Total red SN2 across all nexp exposures
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### harname

- Column Name: harname
- Description: IFU harness name
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: String


#### frlplug

- Column Name: frlplug
- Description: Frplug hardware code
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int32


#### cartid

- Column Name: cartid
- Description: Cartridge ID number
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: String


#### designid

- Column Name: designid
- Description: Design ID number
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int32


#### cenra

- Column Name: cenra
- Description: Plate center right ascension in J2000
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float64


#### cendec

- Column Name: cendec
- Description: Plate center declination in J2000
- Unit: degrees
- Data Type: Float64


#### airmsmin

- Column Name: airmsmin
- Description: Minimum airmass across all exposures
- Unit: degrees
- Data Type: Float32


#### airmsmed

- Column Name: airmsmed
- Description: Median airmass across all exposures
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### airmsmax

- Column Name: airmsmax
- Description: Maximum airmass across all exposures
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### seemin

- Column Name: seemin
- Description: Best guider seeing
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### seemed

- Column Name: seemed
- Description: Median guider seeing
- Unit: arcsec
- Data Type: Float32


#### seemax

- Column Name: seemax
- Description: Worst guider seeing
- Unit: arcsec
- Data Type: Float32


#### transmin

- Column Name: transmin
- Description: Worst transparency
- Unit: arcsec
- Data Type: Float32


#### transmed

- Column Name: transmed
- Description: Median transparency
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### transmax

- Column Name: transmax
- Description: Best transparency
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### mjdmin

- Column Name: mjdmin
- Description: Minimum MJD across all exposures
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int32


#### mjdmed

- Column Name: mjdmed
- Description: Median MJD across all exposures
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int32


#### mjdmax

- Column Name: mjdmax
- Description: Maximum MJD across all exposures
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int32


#### gfwhm

- Column Name: gfwhm
- Description: Reconstructed FWHM in g-band
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### rfwhm

- Column Name: rfwhm
- Description: Reconstructed FWHM in r-band
- Unit: arcsec
- Data Type: Float32


#### ifwhm

- Column Name: ifwhm
- Description: Reconstructed FWHM in i-band
- Unit: arcsec
- Data Type: Float32


#### zfwhm

- Column Name: zfwhm
- Description: Reconstructed FWHM in z-band
- Unit: arcsec
- Data Type: Float32


#### mngtarg1

- Column Name: mngtarg1
- Description: Manga-target1 maskbit for galaxy target catalog
- Unit: arcsec
- Data Type: Int64


#### mngtarg2

- Column Name: mngtarg2
- Description: Manga-target2 maskbit for galaxy target catalog
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int64


#### mngtarg3

- Column Name: mngtarg3
- Description: Manga-target3 maskbit for galaxy target catalog
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int64


#### catidnum

- Column Name: catidnum
- Description: Primary target input catalog (leading digits of mangaid)
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int64


#### plttarg

- Column Name: plttarg
- Description: plateTarget reference file appropriate for this target
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: String


#### manga_tileid

- Column Name: manga_tileid
- Description: The ID of the tile to which this object has been allocated
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int32


#### nsa_iauname

- Column Name: nsa_iauname
- Description: IAU-style designation based on RA/Dec (NSA)
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: String


#### ifutargetsize

- Column Name: ifutargetsize
- Description: The ideal IFU size for this object. The intended IFU size is equal to IFUTargetSize except if IFUTargetSize &gt; 127 when it is 127, or &lt; 19 when it is 19
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int32


#### ifudesignsize

- Column Name: ifudesignsize
- Description: The allocated IFU size (0 = "unallocated")
- Unit: fibers
- Data Type: Int32


#### ifudesignwrongsize

- Column Name: ifudesignwrongsize
- Description: The allocated IFU size if the intended IFU size was not available
- Unit: fibers
- Data Type: Int32


#### z

- Column Name: z
- Description: The targeting redshift (identical to nsa_z for those targets in the NSA Catalog. For others, it is the redshift provided by the Ancillary programs)
- Unit: fibers
- Data Type: Float32


#### zmin

- Column Name: zmin
- Description: The minimum redshift at which the galaxy could still have been included in the Primary sample
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### zmax

- Column Name: zmax
- Description: The maximum redshift at which the galaxy could still have been included in the Primary sample
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### szmin

- Column Name: szmin
- Description: The minimum redshift at which the galaxy could still have been included in the Secondary sample
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### szmax

- Column Name: szmax
- Description: The maximum redshift at which the galaxy could still have been included in the Secondary sample
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### ezmin

- Column Name: ezmin
- Description: The minimum redshift at which the galaxy could still have been included in the Primary+ sample
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### ezmax

- Column Name: ezmax
- Description: The minimum redshift at which the galaxy could still have been included in the Primary+ sample
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### probs

- Column Name: probs
- Description: The probability that a Secondary sample galaxy is included after down-sampling. For galaxies not in the Secondary sample PROBS is set to the mean down-sampling probability
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### pweight

- Column Name: pweight
- Description: The volume weight for the Primary sample. Corrects the MaNGA selection to a volume limited sample.
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### psweight

- Column Name: psweight
- Description: The volume weight for the combined Primary and full Secondary samples. Corrects the MaNGA selection to a volume limited sample.
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### psrweight

- Column Name: psrweight
- Description: The volume weight for the combined Primary and down-sampled Secondary samples. Corrects the MaNGA selection to a volume limited sample.
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### sweight

- Column Name: sweight
- Description: The volume weight for the full Secondary sample. Corrects the MaNGA selection to a volume limited sample.
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### srweight

- Column Name: srweight
- Description: The volume weight for the down-sampled Secondary sample. Corrects the MaNGA selection to a volume limited sample.
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### eweight

- Column Name: eweight
- Description: The volume weight for the Primary+ sample. Corrects the MaNGA selection to a volume limited sample.
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### esweight

- Column Name: esweight
- Description: The volume weight for the combined Primary+ and full Secondary samples. Corrects the MaNGA selection to a volume limited sample.
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### esrweight

- Column Name: esrweight
- Description: The volume weight for the combined Primary+ and down-sampled Secondary samples. Corrects the MaNGA selection to a volume limited sample.
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_field

- Column Name: nsa_field
- Description: SDSS field ID covering the target
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int32


#### nsa_run

- Column Name: nsa_run
- Description: SDSS run ID covering the target
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int32


#### nsa_camcol

- Column Name: nsa_camcol
- Description: SDSS camcol ID covering the catalog position.
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int32


#### nsa_version

- Column Name: nsa_version
- Description: Version of NSA catalogue used to select these targets
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: String


#### nsa_nsaid

- Column Name: nsa_nsaid
- Description: The NSAID field in the NSA catalogue referenced in nsa_version.
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int32


#### nsa_nsaid_v1b

- Column Name: nsa_nsaid_v1b
- Description: The NSAID of the target in the NSA_v1b_0_0_v2 catalogue (if applicable).
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int32


#### nsa_z

- Column Name: nsa_z
- Description: Heliocentric redshift (NSA)
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_zdist

- Column Name: nsa_zdist
- Description: Distance estimate using peculiar velocity model of Willick et al. (1997), expressed as a redshift equivalent; multiply by c/H0 for Mpc (NSA)
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_mass

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_mass
- Description: Stellar mass from K-correction fit (use with caution) for elliptical Petrosian fluxes (NSA)
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_absmag_f

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_absmag_f
- Description: Absolute magnitude in rest-frame GALEX far-UV, from elliptical Petrosian fluxes (NSA)
- Unit: solar masses
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_absmag_n

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_absmag_n
- Description: Absolute magnitude in rest-frame GALEX near-UV, from elliptical Petrosian fluxes (NSA)
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_absmag_u

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_absmag_u
- Description: Absolute magnitude in rest-frame SDSS u-band, from elliptical Petrosian fluxes (NSA)
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_absmag_g

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_absmag_g
- Description: Absolute magnitude in rest-frame SDSS g-band, from elliptical Petrosian fluxes (NSA)
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_absmag_r

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_absmag_r
- Description: Absolute magnitude in rest-frame SDSS r-band, from elliptical Petrosian fluxes (NSA)
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_absmag_i

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_absmag_i
- Description: Absolute magnitude in rest-frame SDSS i-band, from elliptical Petrosian fluxes (NSA)
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_absmag_z

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_absmag_z
- Description: Absolute magnitude in rest-frame SDSS z-band, from elliptical Petrosian fluxes (NSA)
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_amivar_f

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_amivar_f
- Description: Inverse variance of elpetro_absmag_f (NSA)
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_amivar_n

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_amivar_n
- Description: Inverse variance of elpetro_absmag_n (NSA)
- Unit: mag^{-2}
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_amivar_u

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_amivar_u
- Description: Inverse variance of elpetro_absmag_u (NSA)
- Unit: mag^{-2}
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_amivar_g

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_amivar_g
- Description: Inverse variance of elpetro_absmag_g (NSA)
- Unit: mag^{-2}
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_amivar_r

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_amivar_r
- Description: Inverse variance of elpetro_absmag_r (NSA)
- Unit: mag^{-2}
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_amivar_i

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_amivar_i
- Description: Inverse variance of elpetro_absmag_i (NSA)
- Unit: mag^{-2}
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_amivar_z

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_amivar_z
- Description: Inverse variance of elpetro_absmag_z (NSA)
- Unit: mag^{-2}
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_flux_f

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_flux_f
- Description: Elliptical SDSS-style Petrosian flux in GALEX far-UV (using r-band aperture) (NSA)
- Unit: mag^{-2}
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_flux_n

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_flux_n
- Description: Elliptical SDSS-style Petrosian flux in GALEX near-UV (using r-band aperture) (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_flux_u

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_flux_u
- Description: Elliptical SDSS-style Petrosian flux in SDSS u-band (using r-band aperture) (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_flux_g

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_flux_g
- Description: Elliptical SDSS-style Petrosian flux in SDSS g-band (using r-band aperture) (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_flux_r

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_flux_r
- Description: Elliptical SDSS-style Petrosian flux in SDSS r-band (using r-band aperture) (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_flux_i

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_flux_i
- Description: Elliptical SDSS-style Petrosian flux in SDSS i-band (using r-band aperture) (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_flux_z

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_flux_z
- Description: Elliptical SDSS-style Petrosian flux in SDSS z-band (using r-band aperture) (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_flux_ivar_f

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_flux_ivar_f
- Description: Inverse variance of elpetroflux_f (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_flux_ivar_n

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_flux_ivar_n
- Description: Inverse variance of elpetroflux_n (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies^{-2}
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_flux_ivar_u

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_flux_ivar_u
- Description: Inverse variance of elpetroflux_u (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies^{-2}
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_flux_ivar_g

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_flux_ivar_g
- Description: Inverse variance of elpetroflux_g (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies^{-2}
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_flux_ivar_r

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_flux_ivar_r
- Description: Inverse variance of elpetroflux_r (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies^{-2}
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_flux_ivar_i

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_flux_ivar_i
- Description: Inverse variance of elpetroflux_i (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies^{-2}
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_flux_ivar_z

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_flux_ivar_z
- Description: Inverse variance of elpetroflux_z (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies^{-2}
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_th50_r

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_th50_r
- Description: Elliptical Petrosian 50% light radius in SDSS r-band (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies^{-2}
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_phi

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_phi
- Description: Position angle (east of north) used for elliptical apertures (for this version, same as ba90) (NSA)
- Unit: arcsec
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_elpetro_ba

- Column Name: nsa_elpetro_ba
- Description: Axis ratio used for elliptical apertures (for this version, same as ba90) (NSA)
- Unit: deg
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_sersic_mass

- Column Name: nsa_sersic_mass
- Description: Stellar mass from K-correction fit (use with caution) for Sersic fluxes (NSA)
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_sersic_absmag_f

- Column Name: nsa_sersic_absmag_f
- Description: Absolute magnitude in rest-frame GALEX near-UV, from Sersic fluxes (NSA)
- Unit: solar mass
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_sersic_absmag_n

- Column Name: nsa_sersic_absmag_n
- Description: Absolute magnitude in rest-frame GALEX far-UV, from Sersic fluxes (NSA)
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_sersic_absmag_u

- Column Name: nsa_sersic_absmag_u
- Description: Absolute magnitude in rest-frame SDSS u-band, from Sersic fluxes (NSA)
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_sersic_absmag_g

- Column Name: nsa_sersic_absmag_g
- Description: Absolute magnitude in rest-frame SDSS g-band, from Sersic fluxes (NSA)
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_sersic_absmag_r

- Column Name: nsa_sersic_absmag_r
- Description: Absolute magnitude in rest-frame SDSS r-band, from Sersic fluxes (NSA)
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_sersic_absmag_i

- Column Name: nsa_sersic_absmag_i
- Description: Absolute magnitude in rest-frame SDSS i-band, from Sersic fluxes (NSA)
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_sersic_absmag_z

- Column Name: nsa_sersic_absmag_z
- Description: Absolute magnitude in rest-frame SDSS z-band, from Sersic fluxes (NSA)
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_sersic_flux_f

- Column Name: nsa_sersic_flux_f
- Description: Two-dimensional, single-component Sersic fit flux in GALEX far-UV (fit using r-band structural parameters) (NSA)
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_sersic_flux_n

- Column Name: nsa_sersic_flux_n
- Description: Two-dimensional, single-component Sersic fit flux in GALEX near-UV (fit using r-band structural parameters) (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_sersic_flux_u

- Column Name: nsa_sersic_flux_u
- Description: Two-dimensional, single-component Sersic fit flux in SDSS u-band (fit using r-band structural parameters) (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_sersic_flux_g

- Column Name: nsa_sersic_flux_g
- Description: Two-dimensional, single-component Sersic fit flux in SDSS g-band (fit using r-band structural parameters) (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_sersic_flux_r

- Column Name: nsa_sersic_flux_r
- Description: Two-dimensional, single-component Sersic fit flux in SDSS r-band (fit using r-band structural parameters) (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_sersic_flux_i

- Column Name: nsa_sersic_flux_i
- Description: Two-dimensional, single-component Sersic fit flux in SDSS i-band (fit using r-band structural parameters) (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_sersic_flux_z

- Column Name: nsa_sersic_flux_z
- Description: Two-dimensional, single-component Sersic fit flux in SDSS z-band (fit using r-band structural parameters) (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_sersic_flux_ivar_f

- Column Name: nsa_sersic_flux_ivar_f
- Description: Inverse variance of sersic_flux_f (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_sersic_flux_ivar_n

- Column Name: nsa_sersic_flux_ivar_n
- Description: Inverse variance of sersic_flux_n (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies^{-2}
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_sersic_flux_ivar_u

- Column Name: nsa_sersic_flux_ivar_u
- Description: Inverse variance of sersic_flux_u (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies^{-2}
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_sersic_flux_ivar_g

- Column Name: nsa_sersic_flux_ivar_g
- Description: Inverse variance of sersic_flux_g (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies^{-2}
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_sersic_flux_ivar_r

- Column Name: nsa_sersic_flux_ivar_r
- Description: Inverse variance of sersic_flux_r (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies^{-2}
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_sersic_flux_ivar_i

- Column Name: nsa_sersic_flux_ivar_i
- Description: Inverse variance of sersic_flux_i (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies^{-2}
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_sersic_flux_ivar_z

- Column Name: nsa_sersic_flux_ivar_z
- Description: Inverse variance of sersic_flux_z (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies^{-2}
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_sersic_th50

- Column Name: nsa_sersic_th50
- Description: 50% light radius of two-dimensional, single-component Sersic fit to r-band (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies^{-2}
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_sersic_phi

- Column Name: nsa_sersic_phi
- Description: Angle (E of N) of major axis in two-dimensional, single-component Sersic fit in r-band (NSA)
- Unit: arcsec
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_sersic_ba

- Column Name: nsa_sersic_ba
- Description: Axis ratio b/a from two-dimensional, single-component Sersic fit in r-band (NSA)
- Unit: deg
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_sersic_n

- Column Name: nsa_sersic_n
- Description: Sersic index from two-dimensional, single-component Sersic fit in r-band (NSA)
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_petro_flux_f

- Column Name: nsa_petro_flux_f
- Description: Azimuthally-averaged SDSS-style Petrosian flux in GALEX far-UV (using r-band aperture) (NSA)
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_petro_flux_n

- Column Name: nsa_petro_flux_n
- Description: Azimuthally-averaged SDSS-style Petrosian flux in GALEX far-UV (using r-band aperture) (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_petro_flux_u

- Column Name: nsa_petro_flux_u
- Description: Azimuthally-averaged SDSS-style Petrosian flux in SDSS u-band (using r-band aperture) (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_petro_flux_g

- Column Name: nsa_petro_flux_g
- Description: Azimuthally-averaged SDSS-style Petrosian flux in SDSS g-band (using r-band aperture) (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_petro_flux_r

- Column Name: nsa_petro_flux_r
- Description: Azimuthally-averaged SDSS-style Petrosian flux in SDSS r-band (using r-band aperture) (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_petro_flux_i

- Column Name: nsa_petro_flux_i
- Description: Azimuthally-averaged SDSS-style Petrosian flux in SDSS i-band (using r-band aperture) (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_petro_flux_z

- Column Name: nsa_petro_flux_z
- Description: Azimuthally-averaged SDSS-style Petrosian flux in SDSS z-band (using r-band aperture) (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_petro_flux_ivar_f

- Column Name: nsa_petro_flux_ivar_f
- Description: Inverse variance of petro_flux_f (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_petro_flux_ivar_n

- Column Name: nsa_petro_flux_ivar_n
- Description: Inverse variance of petro_flux_n (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies^{-2}
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_petro_flux_ivar_u

- Column Name: nsa_petro_flux_ivar_u
- Description: Inverse variance of petro_flux_u (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies^{-2}
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_petro_flux_ivar_g

- Column Name: nsa_petro_flux_ivar_g
- Description: Inverse variance of petro_flux_g (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies^{-2}
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_petro_flux_ivar_r

- Column Name: nsa_petro_flux_ivar_r
- Description: Inverse variance of petro_flux_r (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies^{-2}
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_petro_flux_ivar_i

- Column Name: nsa_petro_flux_ivar_i
- Description: Inverse variance of petro_flux_i (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies^{-2}
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_petro_flux_ivar_z

- Column Name: nsa_petro_flux_ivar_z
- Description: Inverse variance of petro_flux_z (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies^{-2}
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_petro_th50

- Column Name: nsa_petro_th50
- Description: Azimuthally averaged SDSS-style Petrosian 50% light radius (derived from r band) (NSA)
- Unit: nanomaggies^{-2}
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_extinction_f

- Column Name: nsa_extinction_f
- Description: Galactic extinction from Schlegel, Finkbeiner, and Davis (1997), in GALEX far-UV (NSA)
- Unit: arcsec
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_extinction_n

- Column Name: nsa_extinction_n
- Description: Galactic extinction from Schlegel, Finkbeiner, and Davis (1997), in GALEX near-UV (NSA)
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_extinction_u

- Column Name: nsa_extinction_u
- Description: Galactic extinction from Schlegel, Finkbeiner, and Davis (1997), in SDSS u-band (NSA)
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_extinction_g

- Column Name: nsa_extinction_g
- Description: Galactic extinction from Schlegel, Finkbeiner, and Davis (1997), in SDSS g-band (NSA)
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_extinction_r

- Column Name: nsa_extinction_r
- Description: Galactic extinction from Schlegel, Finkbeiner, and Davis (1997), in SDSS r-band (NSA)
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_extinction_i

- Column Name: nsa_extinction_i
- Description: Galactic extinction from Schlegel, Finkbeiner, and Davis (1997), in SDSS i-band (NSA)
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float32


#### nsa_extinction_z

- Column Name: nsa_extinction_z
- Description: Galactic extinction from Schlegel, Finkbeiner, and Davis (1997), in SDSS z-band (NSA)
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float32


#### htmid

- Column Name: htmid
- Description: 20-level deep Hierarchical Triangular Mesh ID
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Int64
